# World

- 2 hours ago
[US rescues airman, vows 'hell' for Iran if Strait stays shut](https://www.reuters.com/business/aerospace-defense/trump-israel-pressure-iran-ahead-deadline-search-continues-missing-us-airman-2026-04-04/)

In the sort of mixed messaging that has baffled supporters and foes alike, let alone financial markets, Trump told Fox News that Iran was negotiating, with a deal possible by Monday.

[![Social media image appears to show U.S. aircraft wreckage in Iran](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/UJ2SUIGZGJMQJEFB6GVCLEAHPU.jpg?auth=8a5d164f07117daa6072fed5d9fb65d291dea37b4ff1fc4d8aa0caaf60a401a4&width=1200&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/business/aerospace-defense/trump-israel-pressure-iran-ahead-deadline-search-continues-missing-us-airman-2026-04-04/)

['You'll be living in Hell': Trump threatens to hit Iran infrastructure on Tuesday](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/trump-says-us-will-target-irans-infrastructure-tuesday-2026-04-05/)

[Russian Baltic port resumes crude loading after attacks, Bloomberg News reports](https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/russian-baltic-port-resumes-crude-loading-after-attacks-bloomberg-news-reports-2026-04-05/)



[![A satellite image shows smoke rising from Russia's Baltic port of Ust-Luga](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/CWGEZVA4RVLOHHYTTGLVZOGRYY.jpg?auth=20f9540eb41e3c05c435ef21dd272b2cf754005087fe307f171d971c2ccf88a0&width=1200&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/russian-baltic-port-resumes-crude-loading-after-attacks-bloomberg-news-reports-2026-04-05/)

- [Chinacategory](https://www.reuters.com/world/china/)·11 hours ago

[China executes French citizen convicted of drug trafficking](https://www.reuters.com/world/china/china-executes-french-citizen-convicted-drug-trafficking-2026-04-05/)

China confirmed on Sunday the execution of a French national sentenced ​to death in 2010 for drug trafficking, saying ‌it did not discriminate against defendants on the basis of nationality, a day after Paris criticised the court handling of ​the case.

[![Reuters logo](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/466BJJQ7PVGY5O53NZ3KL65MHM.png?auth=b9c3bf166c40a6778eb5672993fde7c30a15f48329026674eff92afd8da1d0ca&width=480&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/world/china/china-executes-french-citizen-convicted-drug-trafficking-2026-04-05/)

- 5 hours ago

[Bangladesh launches emergency vaccination campaign as measles outbreak spreads](https://www.reuters.com/business/healthcare-pharmaceuticals/bangladesh-launches-emergency-vaccination-campaign-measles-outbreak-spreads-2026-04-05/)

Bangladesh on Sunday launched an emergency vaccination campaign targeting more than a million children as a fast‑spreading measles ​outbreak sweeps across the country.

[![Reuters logo](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/466BJJQ7PVGY5O53NZ3KL65MHM.png?auth=b9c3bf166c40a6778eb5672993fde7c30a15f48329026674eff92afd8da1d0ca&width=480&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/business/healthcare-pharmaceuticals/bangladesh-launches-emergency-vaccination-campaign-measles-outbreak-spreads-2026-04-05/)

- [Middle Eastcategory](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/)·4 hours ago

[Trump gives Iran until Tuesday night to open Strait of Hormuz, WSJ reports](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/deadline-iran-open-strait-hormuz-is-tuesday-evening-trump-tells-wsj-2026-04-05/)

U.S. President Donald Trump said ​his deadline for Iran to open ‌the Strait of Hormuz or face attacks on critical infrastructure is Tuesday evening, ​according to an interview ​he gave to the Wall Street Journal ⁠on Sunday.

[![A cargo ship in the Gulf, near the Strait of Hormuz](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/NHDPX6Y3Y5KUBJS4QSRALTOHOI.jpg?auth=6589ca6b03e90339460c00b9609aae8b79a4703ae09fa532e007b6629d5fd4d5&width=480&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/deadline-iran-open-strait-hormuz-is-tuesday-evening-trump-tells-wsj-2026-04-05/)

- [Middle Eastcategory](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/)·4 hours ago

[Russia says US should abandon 'language of ultimatums' on Iran](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/russia-says-us-should-abandon-language-ultimatums-iran-2026-04-05/)

Russia expressed hope on Sunday ​that efforts to de-escalate the Iran ‌conflict would bear fruit and said the U.S. would contribute by "abandoning the language ​of ultimatums and returning ​the situation to a negotiating track."

[![Reuters logo](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/466BJJQ7PVGY5O53NZ3KL65MHM.png?auth=b9c3bf166c40a6778eb5672993fde7c30a15f48329026674eff92afd8da1d0ca&width=480&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/russia-says-us-should-abandon-language-ultimatums-iran-2026-04-05/)

- [Middle Eastcategory](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/)·8 hours ago

[Iran says several 'enemy aircraft' destroyed during US pilot rescue mission](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/iran-says-several-enemy-flying-objects-destroyed-during-us-pilot-rescue-mission-2026-04-05/)

They included two C-130 military transport planes and two Black Hawk helicopters, Iran said.

[![Photos purporting to show U.S. aircraft destroyed during the U.S. mission to find a stranded airman in Iran](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/4ODGA4BK3BJ7ZMDMHIJ2AZMNMA.jpg?auth=2b80c18b58728e872fda17eb413a780da0113c8dd3ff74b2c18a1ec3d5016d78&width=480&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/iran-says-several-enemy-flying-objects-destroyed-during-us-pilot-rescue-mission-2026-04-05/)

- [Africacategory](https://www.reuters.com/world/africa/)·3 hours ago

[Congo says it will receive third-country deportees under new deal with US](https://www.reuters.com/world/africa/congo-says-it-will-receive-third-country-deportees-under-new-deal-with-us-2026-04-05/)

The government ​did not say how many it had ​agreed to take.

[![Congo holds presidential election in Kinshasa](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/UXZCLNDBL5M25NGDQ5FAS2WMGY.jpg?auth=34d7f0a1f6d60022e294f3a15adc623011a765d612647aab5b04077899e03b98&width=480&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/world/africa/congo-says-it-will-receive-third-country-deportees-under-new-deal-with-us-2026-04-05/)

- [Worldcategory](https://www.reuters.com/world/)·5 hours ago

[Ships near Italy rescue 32 migrants, 71 lost at sea, charities say](https://www.reuters.com/world/ships-near-italy-rescue-32-migrants-71-lost-sea-charities-say-2026-04-05/)

Two merchant vessels near the Italian coast recovered the bodies of two migrants and ​rescued 32 survivors from a boat trying ‌to cross to Europe from Libya on Easter weekend, rescue charities said, citing the survivors as saying 71 others ​were lost at sea.

[![Sea-Watch migrant search and rescue ship at the SAR zone off Libya](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/UAB2765WFVILLJWTAS64MRX7NI.jpg?auth=f40f861e5e5ca928f5c23e3e0a9556380b1849826a0472a6cc78ad936773d382&width=480&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/world/ships-near-italy-rescue-32-migrants-71-lost-sea-charities-say-2026-04-05/)

- [Chinacategory](https://www.reuters.com/world/china/)·4 hours ago

[China ready to cooperate with Russia to ease Middle East tension, foreign minister says](https://www.reuters.com/world/china/china-ready-cooperate-with-russia-ease-middle-east-tension-foreign-minister-says-2026-04-05/)

China is willing to continue to cooperate with Russia at the U.N. Security Council ​and make efforts to cool down the Middle East situation, ‌Foreign Minister Wang Yi told his Russian counterpart Sergei Lavrov in a phone call on Sunday.

[![Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi attends a press conference on the sidelines of the National People's Congress, in Beijing](https://www.reuters.com/resizer/v2/FNQRFWZ7XRPDDO2MPNPXOYVWLQ.jpg?auth=1d46b5696ff17421ab89453b7b8e56def3caae3731beb357c76a4850cb146198&width=480&quality=80)](https://www.reuters.com/world/china/china-ready-cooperate-with-russia-ease-middle-east-tension-foreign-minister-says-2026-04-05/)

### Information you can trust

Reuters, the news and media division of Thomson Reuters, is the world’s largest multimedia news provider, reaching billions of people worldwide every day. Reuters provides business, financial, national and international news to professionals via desktop terminals, the world's media organizations, industry events and directly to consumers.

- #### [Workspace, opens new tab](https://www.lseg.com/en/data-analytics/products/workspace?utm_source=reuters.com&utm_medium=footer&utm_campaign=Reuters_ProductPage_Links)   Access unmatched financial data, news and content in a highly-customised workflow experience on desktop, web and mobile.

- #### [Data Catalogue, opens new tab](https://www.lseg.com/en/data-analytics/financial-data/?utm_source=reuters.com&utm_medium=footer&utm_campaign=Reuters_DataCatalogPage_Links)   Browse an unrivalled portfolio of real-time and historical market data and insights from worldwide sources and experts.

- #### [World-Check, opens new tab](https://www.lseg.com/en/risk-intelligence/screening-solutions/world-check-kyc-screening?utm_source=reuters.com&utm_medium=footer&utm_campaign=Reuters_ProductPage_Links)   Screen for heightened risk individual and entities globally to help uncover hidden risks in business relationships and human networks.
